title: Hidden Pattern Pair
theme: Mostly unrelated fragments with one striking pair
description: A noisy set of prompts where only two fragments share a meaningful repeated pattern.

rounds.prompt: I leave receipts in jacket pockets for months without meaning to.
The smell of an old dish sponge means I will replace it immediately no matter what else I was doing.
I keep catching the clock at 11:11 often enough that it feels specific.
The other time I keep seeing is 3:33, which makes the repeated-number thing feel hard to ignore.
Hardware stores make me vaguely sad in a way that seems unrelated to the number thing.

checkpoints.label: Only the repeated-number pair should trigger a tentative bridge

assertions.reason: The runner should isolate the strong pair without connecting the entire noisy set.

finalAssertions.reason: One strong local pattern should not grow into many unsupported theories.
The repeated-number connection should stay tentative unless further evidence arrives.
